hero.title: Weekly Challenges
hero.description: Push yourself beyond daily lessons. Complete challenges, earn badges, and grow alongside the LifeSkillify community.

challenges.title: 7-Day Gratitude Journal
challenges.description: Write down three things you're grateful for each morning. Build a positive mindset habit that compounds over time.
tasks: Day 1: Write 3 things you're grateful for
Day 2: Include one person you're thankful for
Day 3: Add one small win from yesterday
Day 4: Reflect on a challenge that made you stronger
Day 5: Appreciate something about your environment
Day 6: Write about a skill you're developing
Day 7: Review your week and note patterns

challenges.title: No-Phone Morning
challenges.description: Keep your phone away for the first 60 minutes after waking. Reclaim your mornings for intentional growth.
tasks: Day 1: No phone for first 30 minutes
Day 2: Extend to 45 minutes
Day 3: Reach 60 minutes — do your daily skill lesson instead
Day 4: Add a 5-minute stretch or walk
Day 5: Reflect on how your mornings have changed

challenges.title: Budget Awareness Week
challenges.description: Track every expense for a week. No judgment — just awareness. Knowledge is the first step to financial confidence.
tasks: Day 1: Set up a simple expense tracker (notes app works)
Day 2: Log every purchase, no matter how small
Day 3: Categorize spending: needs vs wants
Day 4: Identify your top 3 spending categories
Day 5: Find one expense you can reduce
Day 6: Calculate your weekly total
Day 7: Set one financial goal for next month

challenges.title: Active Listening Challenge
challenges.description: Practice active listening in every conversation. Paraphrase, ask questions, and resist the urge to interrupt.
tasks: Day 1: Paraphrase once in every conversation
Day 2: Ask one open-ended question per chat
Day 3: Put phone away during all conversations
Day 4: Practice the 2-second pause before responding
Day 5: Share your biggest insight in Community

challenges.title: 30-Day Habit Streak
challenges.description: Complete your daily LifeSkillify lesson for 30 consecutive days. The ultimate consistency challenge.
tasks: Complete today's skill lesson every day
Log your completion in the progress tracker
Share milestones at days 7, 14, and 21 in Community
Reflect on what changed by day 30

challenges.title: Digital Detox Weekend
challenges.description: Spend one full weekend with minimal screen time. Rediscover offline joys and mental clarity.
tasks: Saturday: Limit social media to 30 minutes total
Saturday: Do one offline activity you enjoy
Sunday: No screens before noon
Sunday: Journal about how you feel without constant stimulation
